title: erigeron pallens
intro: Erigeron pallens, also known as the pale daisy or pale fleabane, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erigeron pallens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Erigeron pallens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal use, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
